description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy to GitHub Pages that triggers on push to the master branch and any branch matching *doc*. The workflow should have read access to repository contents, write access to GitHub Pages, and write access to ID tokens. It should use a concurrency group named pages without canceling in-progress jobs. The workflow consists of two jobs: build and deploy. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.x, installs mkdocs and related plugins, builds the site with mkdocs, and uploads the site as an artifact. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the build job, and deploys the artifact to GitHub Pages.
